title: ionidium enneaspermum var. hirtum
intro: Ionidium enneaspermum var. hirtum, also known as Chinese violet or five-seeded violet, is a flowering plant species native to China and other parts of East Asia. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ionidium enneaspermum var. hirtum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve headaches and joint pain, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and stems are often dried and made into teas, infusions, or capsules to harness its medicinal properties.
